title: helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum
intro: Helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum, commonly known as Rough Everlasting or Rough Helichrysum, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its numerous health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The therapeutic actions of Helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum include wound healing, skin regeneration, and the management of conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
benefits: Helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum has many benefits, such as its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, making it a valuable natural remedy for individuals suffering from various health conditions. Its anti-inflammatory properties have been shown to relieve pain and swelling associated with conditions like arthritis, while its antioxidant properties help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Additionally, the plant's antimicrobial properties can aid in wound healing, prevent infections, and even support digestion, making it a versatile and valuable addition to a healthy lifestyle. By incorporating Helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum into one's daily routine, individuals can experience improved physical and mental health, increased energy levels, and a higher quality of life.
actions: Helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum has many therapeutic actions, such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its wide range of health benefits. This plant has been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and combat infections, making it an effective treatment for various skin conditions, including acne, eczema, and ulcers. Additionally, its antioxidant properties help protect cells from oxidative stress, potentially reducing the risk of chronic diseases like cancer and heart disease, and improving overall well-being and quality of life. By utilizing the therapeutic actions of helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum, individuals can enjoy improved physical and mental health, increased energy levels, and enhanced resilience to stress and disease.
constituents: Helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum has many active constituents, such as sesquiterpene lactones, including heliangolide, alantolactone, and dihydrocostuslactone, which have been found to exhibit potent anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. These compounds can help alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis, improve wound healing, and protect against cell damage caused by free radicals, thereby improving overall health and well-being. Additionally, the presence of flavonoids, such as kaempferol and quercetin, in this plant have been shown to possess antihistamine and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate seasonal allergies and reduce inflammation. By incorporating the medicinal constituents of Helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum into herbal remedies, individuals can benefit from improved cardiovascular health, enhanced cognitive function, and a reduced risk of chronic diseases.
parts: Helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum has many medicinal parts, such as leaves, roots, and flowers. The leaves of the plant are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The roots of the plant are a source of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever and rheumatism. The flowers of the plant contain essential oils with a high concentration of nerolidol, which has been used to treat digestive issues and promote wound healing.
preparations: Helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum has many herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used for various medicinal purposes. Tea made from the leaves of the Helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum plant is used to treat digestive issues and promote relaxation. The tincture is used to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. Essential oil extracted from the plant is used in aromatherapy to reduce stress and improve mood, while also being used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
side_effects: Helichrysum bilobum subsp. scabrum can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. Some individuals may experience dizziness, nausea, or headaches due to the plant's volatile compounds. High doses or prolonged use can lead to increased heart rate, anxiety, and insomnia. Furthermore, improper use may also cause kidney or liver damage in rare cases, highlighting the importance of proper guidance and dosage.
